remainingWork: Implement trusted resolved-skill native binding independent of publish authority.
Extract and adopt one provider-neutral resolver core with cross-host parity fixtures.
Implement immutable/versioned rollout and stale-worker exclusion.
Add operator capability-failure classification, budget protection, diagnostics, metrics, and alerts.
Add a readiness-gating parent-to-resolver canary and required Temporal/Compose/restart regression coverage.
Update the required architecture, deployment, restart, and registration-failure documentation.
summary: Attempt 2 verifies the executable WorkerSpec activity-composition fix, but six concrete MM-1202 target-state gaps remain. The complete structured findings and mandatory next-remediation input are in artifacts/jira-implement-verify.json.
